title: Buttery Crunchy Mediterranean Steak Kebabs
description: A Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring lean minced steak, crunchy elements, and a rich buttery flavor, perfect for a brunch mood. This kosher-friendly recipe incorporates bhuna spices for added depth.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, mix together the minced steak, bhuna spice mix, and a pinch of salt and pepper until just combined.
Thread the steak mixture onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they reach an internal temperature of 63°C for medium-rare.
While the skewers are cooking, melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add the chopped sun-dried tomatoes, artichoke hearts, and a squeeze of lemon juice to the melted butter. Stir to combine.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it on the grill for a minute or two.

To assemble the kebabs, place a cooked skewer on each pita bread, followed by a spoonful of the butter and tomato mixture, some crumbled feta cheese, and a sprinkle of chopped parsley and Kalamata olives.
